overview.summary: Anyplan defines a portable AI collaboration framework, a schema-backed guidance instance, adoption tooling, and a visual engine. The project is validating the framework through self-application.
highlights: Portable framework under framework/ with English specifications
Guidance instance and JSON Schema at instances/anyplan/guidance.json
Adoption guide and init/validate scripts for other repositories
Dashboard-oriented visual engine for overview, roadmap, and tasks

roadmap.summary: Establish the guidance contract and tooling first, then deepen visual editing, validation automation, and multi-instance support.

phases.title: Bootstrap framework and engine
phases.summary: Portable spec, Anyplan instance, static engine, research boundary, bounded context retrieval, adoption path.

milestones.title: Dashboard visual engine
milestones.summary: Tree navigation, detail reader, dashboard.json contract.

phases.title: Engine and validation hardening
phases.summary: Schema validation in CI, optional engine write-back, richer document-map editing.

milestones.title: CI validation
milestones.summary: Guidance and dashboard checks on every change.

milestones.title: Guided instance export
milestones.summary: Save dashboard and guidance edits from the engine with review.

phases.title: Multi-project ecosystem
phases.summary: Multiple instances, case-study templates, optional hosted viewer.

milestones.title: Instance switcher
milestones.summary: Load any instances/<id>/ pair from the engine.

completedTasks.title: ADR 0001 bootstrap framework
completedTasks.summary: Documented the document + schema + instance + engine closed loop.

completedTasks.title: English docs and research boundary
completedTasks.summary: ADR 0002 and research directory separation from portable framework.

completedTasks.title: Bounded context retrieval
completedTasks.summary: ADR 0003, schema document metadata, Anygine extraction research.

completedTasks.title: Dashboard GUI and document-generation spec
completedTasks.summary: engine/ tree UI, dashboard schema, validate-dashboard.sh.

currentPhase.title: Bootstrap framework and engine
currentPhase.summary: Phase 1 deliverables are in place. Next: CI validation and optional engine write-back (phase 2).

tasks.title: Phase 1 closeout review
tasks.summary: Review guidance instance, dashboard data, doc-index, and adoption docs for consistency.

tasks.title: Add CI validation job
tasks.summary: Run validate-guidance.sh and validate-dashboard.sh in CI (phase 2 tooling).
